session.summary: Added --headed flag support to cherenkov-qa CLI across 3 files (cherenkov.py, validate.py, playwright_invoke.py). Fixed WSL distro detection in playwright_invoke.py to use -d Ubuntu-24.04 instead of default distro (docker-desktop). Reinstalled npm packages to fix version mismatch (1.60.0->1.56.1). Installed Playwright Chromium browser. System browser dependencies (libnspr4, libnss3, libasound2t64) could not be installed due to apt network issues.

previous_sessions.summary: Wired the three remaining MCP stub tools (run_k6_perf, export_jira_ticket, scan_mena_compliance) to their respective components (OrchestrationEngine, JiraExporter, MENAComplianceScanner) with input validation at trust boundaries, and verified all 417 unit/integration tests pass in WSL.

Implemented action.yml and entrypoint.sh to support CHERENKOV GitHub Action, updated Dockerfile to use the entrypoint wrapper script, wrote unit tests test_github_action.py, verified all 324 unit tests pass, and committed changes.
Completed Milestone R2: Built CodeLens, Diagnostics and Decorator providers. Wrote automated verification for problems panel mapping. Successfully compiled and verified code correctness.
